overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city street. The player character walks along wet sidewalks past various commercial establishments, crosses a street at a large intersection, and enters a darker alleyway. The scene features heavy use of neon lighting with pink, cyan, and red hues reflecting off wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with neon food vendors

events.description: pedestrian in brown jacket passes close by on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, passing neon-lit shopfronts and food stalls on the right

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera on the left wearing a brown jacket and dark pants

entered.detail: fast food storefront with green neon signage and menu displays showing food items
tall building-mounted digital advertisements with bright pink and cyan lighting
modern horizontal LED street lights on black poles
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a neon-lit commercial sidewalk at night, with the player walking past a burrito shop and various food stalls. The wet concrete reflects the vibrant pink and cyan neon signs from nearby buildings. A pedestrian passes closely on the left, and the camera moves steadily forward toward an overhead walkway structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection area with large vertical neon signage

events.description: passing under the overpass structure causing temporary shadow and reduced ambient light
approaching the large Fuyutsuki building at the intersection, revealing the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk toward the major intersection, passing groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing and conversing near the upcoming crosswalk

entered.detail: large vertical neon sign with purple and red lettering advertising the beverage brand
tall red building with curved facade and prominent red neon signage at the top
elevated roadway or walkway crossing above the street with structural supports

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wider intersection area with a prominent 'Jacked and Coke' neon sign on the left. The player passes under an overpass structure that temporarily dims the lighting, then emerges approaching the large Fuyutsuki building straight ahead. Pedestrians are scattered throughout the area, and the wet pavement continues to reflect the vibrant neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with crosswalk and building entrance plaza

events.description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk toward the Fuyutsuki building entrance
turning right to walk along the side of the Fuyutsuki building away from the main street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk and approaching the building entrance before turning right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red beanie and black vest walking in the same direction toward the building

entered.detail: red automated vending machines with glowing product displays and digital interfaces
yellow and white painted stripes on the road surface with glowing green walk symbols

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the wide intersection using the yellow-striped crosswalk, approaching the entrance of the Fuyutsuki building. Red vending machines glow brightly on the right side near the entrance. After reaching the other side, the player turns right to walk along the building's side, moving away from the main thoroughfare into a narrower pathway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alleyway alongside commercial building with industrial elements

events.description: entering a darker alleyway with significantly reduced neon lighting and more shadows
passing under an overpass structure into a more industrial area with metal fencing

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow pathway beside the building, moving deeper into the darker alleyway

entered.detail: plain brown concrete wall with metal panels and industrial fixtures
black metal security fencing running along the right side of the pathway
closed metal roll-up garage door at the end of the alley with dim lighting above

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow, darker alleyway alongside the Fuyutsuki building where neon lighting gives way to dimmer, more industrial lighting. The concrete walls and metal fencing create an enclosed feeling. The pathway continues under an overpass structure toward a closed garage door at the end, with the vibrant city lights now only visible as distant glows from the main street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district into the dim seclusion of an industrial alleyway. It begins on a wet sidewalk reflecting pink and cyan lights as the camera moves past food stalls and a burrito shop toward a distant overhead walkway. As the space opens into a wide intersection, the camera passes under a darkening overpass and emerges before the imposing Fuyutsuki building, with the surrounding pavement shimmering under the glow of a Jacked and Coke sign. The scene then shifts as the player crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk past glowing red vending machines, turning right to leave the main thoroughfare behind. Finally, the environment narrows into a dark alleyway of concrete walls and metal fencing, where the brilliant city lights fade into distant glows as the camera approaches a closed garage door.
